EULA

1. LICENSE

The Game is licensed, not sold, to you for personal, non-commercial use. You may install and use one copy of the Game on a device you own.

2. RESTRICTIONS

You may not copy, modify, or distribute the Game in whole or in part, reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract source code, or use the Game for commercial purposes without prior written permission.

3. OWNERSHIP

The Game and all intellectual property rights remain the property of the developer.

4. UPDATES

The developer may provide updates or patches to the Game at their discretion.

5. PRIVACY

The Game may collect limited data to improve gameplay. By using the Game, you consent to this collection as described in the Privacy Policy.

6. TERMINATION

This EULA is effective until terminated. You may terminate it by deleting all copies of the Game. The developer may terminate this EULA if you violate any terms.

7. DISCLAIMER

The Game is provided "as-is". The developer makes no warranties of any kind regarding the Game’s performance or fitness for a particular purpose.

8. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

The developer is not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the Game.

9. PHOTOSENSITIVITY & SEIZURE WARNING

This software contains rapidly moving graphics, high-contrast particle effects, and explosions. A small percentage of individuals may experience seizures when exposed to certain visual patterns or flashing lights. If you have an epileptic condition, consult a physician before play. Discontinue use immediately if you experience dizziness, altered vision, or disorientation.

10. VISUAL STIMULI & MOTION SICKNESS

This software contains fast-moving geometric patterns and high-contrast transitions. Users who experience dizziness or motion sickness during gameplay should cease use immediately. Consult a physician if you have a history of photosensitive epilepsy.

11. VIRTUAL ASSETS

All in-game items, scores, and rewards are purely cosmetic. They hold no cash value and are not redeemable for real-world currency or physical goods.
